name: Delicious Fruitworld
short_description: Delicious Fruitworld is a classic jump 'n' run platformer where the goal is to complete each level with as many points as possible.Points are awarded for fruits distributed in the world and for a good time in which the level was passed. Share your score!
detailed_description:
Delicious Fruitworld is a classic Jump 'n' Run in which the objective is to complete each level with as many points as possible. The points are increased by collecting the fruits that appear in the levels, decreased by deaths and the remaining time is added as bonus points.

  • Pick the fruits to get points!
  • Overcome obstacles and defeat the enemies!
  • Try to be the best in over 10 levels!
  • Your score will be automatically saved online!
  • There will be sessions after which the game will be adjusted.
  • There are 4 different character to play the levels.

Playing with the controller is supported and also recommended, however playing with the keyboard is possible.
